svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="四道闸流程" id="cg2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-504" dy="-129" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="commit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="git commit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="350" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="闸 1：URL ↔ 路由
前端 axios URL vs 后端 @RequestMapping" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="60" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="闸 2：SQL ↔ DDL
Mapper FROM/JOIN vs Flyway CREATE TABLE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="350" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="闸 3：权限 key ↔ 种子
@RequirePermission vs sys_permission seed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="640" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="闸 4：迁移版本号唯一
V{N}__*.sql 不能重复" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="320" x="280" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="commit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="g1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="commit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="g2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="commit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="g3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="g1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="g4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="g3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="g4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pass" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✅ 全过 → 允许提交" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="530" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b91c1c;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="❌ 任一红 → 拦下" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="200" x="150" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ep" edge="1" parent="1" source="g4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;endArrow=block;" target="pass"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ef" edge="1" parent="1" source="g4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b91c1c;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" target="fail"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="四道闸并行扫，串行判断：任一红就拦，全绿才放行。跑完不到 8 秒。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="780" x="60" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
